de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.hierarchy

Class SortNode

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.hierarchy.SortNode

  • public class SortNode
extends Object
    Represents a node in the class hierarchy. Each SortNode contains a Sort and links to SortNodes containing the parents and the children of the sort.
    Author:
    mihai
